message:
feat(python): numpy.nanmax wrapper parity (franken_numpy-wprq)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.nanmax covering axis, optional
`out=` destination, and keepdims (forwarded only when explicitly
supplied so numpy's `_NoValue` default is preserved). Test covers
no-NaN 1-D, 1-D with NaN, 2-D mixed NaN axis=0/1, fully-NaN slice
returning NaN under silenced warnings, integer input matching plain
max, and keepdims shape parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
